description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rocker/verse:3.4.4 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage job named article. In the article job run the following Rscript commands in order: Rscript -e "remove.packages('rticles')", Rscript -e "devtools::install_github('nuest/rticles', ref = 'copernicus')", Rscript -e "rmarkdown::render('MyArticle/MyArticle.Rmd')", and Rscript -e "rmarkdown::render('MyArticle/MyArticle.Rmd')" again. Publish the MyArticle directory as an artifact that is always uploaded, with no caches, services, or special rules.
